videoDescription: Watch a funny family dinner scene from Young Sheldon and improve your English listening skills with interactive comprehension questions.

quizData.question: Why does Sheldon say he cannot be adopted?
choices: Because he looks like his parents.
Because he has a twin sister.
Because he has a younger brother.
Because he knows his birth parents.
quizData.explanation: Sheldon says, 'How can I be adopted when I have a twin sister?'

quizData.question: What were they about to do before dinner?
What food did Georgie wish they had?
quizData.explanation: Georgie asks, 'How come we ain't got no tater tots?'

quizData.question: What does George Sr. say he prefers?
quizData.explanation: George says he'd take tater tots over mashed potatoes any day.

quizData.question: Why is Georgie unhappy about school?
choices: Sheldon will be in the same grade.
quizData.explanation: Georgie complains that Sheldon will be in the same grade as him.

quizData.question: What does Sheldon say about ninth grade?
choices: He won't stay there for very long.
quizData.explanation: Sheldon says he isn't planning on being in the ninth grade for very long.

quizData.question: Why can't George Sr. go to church?
choices: He is meeting with the other coaches.
quizData.explanation: George Sr. says he is meeting with the other coaches.

quizData.question: Why does Sheldon decide to go to church?
choices: His teacher told him to go.
quizData.explanation: Sheldon says, 'I don't believe in God, but I believe in Mom.'

quizData.question: Who asked Missy to do something?
quizData.explanation: Missy says Heather asked her to do something.

quizData.question: According to Adult Sheldon, where did Jane Goodall go to study apes?
quizData.explanation: Adult Sheldon says Jane Goodall had to go to Africa to study apes.

quizData.question: Complete: 'Sheldon said he was exploring ________ kinematics.'
Complete: 'Mary thanked God for the ________ they were about to receive.'
quizData.explanation: She prayed, 'Thank you, God, for this food we're about to receive.'

quizData.question: Complete: 'George Sr. preferred tater tots over mashed ________.'
quizData.explanation: George says he'd take tater tots over mashed potatoes any day.

quizData.question: Complete: 'High school is a haven for higher ________.'
quizData.explanation: Sheldon describes high school as 'a haven for higher learning.'

quizData.question: Complete: 'I don't believe in God, but I believe in ________.'
quizData.explanation: Sheldon goes to church because he believes in his mother.
